evals.prompt: I need to write a unit test for my PaymentServiceImpl.processPayment() method that should throw a BusinessException when insufficient funds.
evals.expected_output: Uses @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class) with @Mock/@InjectMocks, test named processPayment_shouldThrowBusinessException_whenInsufficientFunds, asserts with assertThatThrownBy

evals.prompt: How do I write a controller test for my OrderController? I keep getting errors about missing beans.
evals.expected_output: Uses @WebMvcTest(OrderController.class) with @MockitoBean for all dependencies including EventPublisher, asserts ApiResponse structure with jsonPath

evals.prompt: I want to write an integration test that tests my repository with a real PostgreSQL database. How do I set this up?
My tests are failing with 'JWT secret must be at least 64 characters'. How do I fix the test configuration?
evals.expected_output: Updates application-test.yml acme.security.jwt.secret to a string at least 64 characters long

evals.prompt: I need a full integration test that tests the complete flow from Kafka consumer to database persistence. Which base class should I use?
evals.expected_output: Extends AbstractFullIntegrationTest which provides both Postgres and Kafka Testcontainers

evals.prompt: My tests fail with 'connection refused to config server'. How do I make tests work without the config server running?
evals.expected_output: Adds spring.config.import: optional:configserver: to application-test.yml and eureka.client.enabled: false
